What We Covered In This Module:
✓ How Testing Lets You Scientifically Improve Your
Results!
✓ Why All Decisions Should Be Driven By Testing Data!
✓ The 3 Big Elements To Test (And In What Order)!
✓ How To Run A Basic Test With The Experiments
Feature In Google Analytics!
✓ How To Run A More Advanced Test With Visual
Website Optimizer

1. 	Decide What Testing Platform You’re Going To Use!

New Test!
